editorial_note: Japan's cumulative $16 billion state commitment to Rapidus crosses a strategic threshold: a 2nm foundry build-out at IIM-1 in Hokkaido, backed by METI, IBM technology transfer, and ASML high-NA EUV, with Fujitsu as the first anchor customer and mass production targeted for H2 2027.
